Bringing Bitcoin and Ethereum together.

The Hemi Virtual Machine

The Hemi VM (hVM) is a full Bitcoin node wrapped inside an EVM, the best way to deliver the capabilities of both networks.

Learn more

A look inside

The Unique Benefits of Hemi

Learn more

Superfinality. Proof-of-Proof security delivers superior decentralization and Bitcoin-powered finality in just a couple of hours.

Portability. Move assets between the Bitcoin and Ethereum networks via Hemi’s Tunnels

Programmability. Build better Bitcoin-aware, EVM-compatible applications with the Hemi Bitcoin Kit (hBK).

Extensibility. Incorporate Bitcoin’s security into any blockchain network, delivering a more secure and reliable Web3 ecosystem. (2025)

Hemi ecosystem

Join a vibrant and growing ecosystem
